2606.08037.title: SafeECGMatch: Calibration-Aware Joint Frequency and Time Space Semi-Supervised Learning for Open-Set ECG Classification
2606.08037.paper_summary: Electrocardiogram (ECG) classification models often suffer from severe label scarcity, making semi-supervised learning (SSL) an attractive strategy for reducing annotation costs. In clinical settings, however, unlabeled pools frequently contain out-of-distribution (OOD) anomalies or diagnostic groups absent from the labeled set. Standard SSL forces incorrect pseudo-labels onto these unseen classes, producing overconfident predictions. To address this, we propose SafeECGMatch, a calibration-aware safe SSL framework for single-label ECG classification under label distribution mismatch. Methodologically, SafeECGMatch employs a dual-branch architecture extracting time-frequency latent representations via ECG-specific augmentations. Crucially, it dynamically aligns confidence with empirical accuracy through adaptive label smoothing and temperature scaling, calibrating both the multiclass classifier and the OOD detector across temporal and spectral domains. This joint optimization allows trustworthy OOD rejection and reliable pseudo-labeling. Evaluated on the PTB-XL and PhysioNet/CinC Challenge benchmarks, SafeECGMatch achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and calibration, advancing reliable knowledge discovery in physiological time-series. Code is available at https://github.com/labhai/SafeECGMatch.
2606.08037.paper_summary_zh: 心電圖（ECG）分類模型常常面臨標籤稀缺的問題，使得半監督學習（SSL）成為降低標註成本的吸引策略。<lb/>然而，在臨床環境中，未標註的數據池經常包含分佈外（OOD）異常或缺失於標註集的診斷組。<lb/>標準的SSL強制將不正確的偽標籤強加於這些未見的類別，導致過度自信的預測。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了SafeECGMatch，這是一個考慮校準的安全SSL框架，適用於標籤分佈不匹配的單標籤ECG分類。<lb/>在方法論上，SafeECGMatch採用雙分支架構，通過ECG特定的增強技術提取時間-頻率潛在表示。<lb/>關鍵在於，它通過自適應標籤平滑和溫度縮放，動態地將信心與經驗準確性對齊，對多類別分類器和OOD檢測器進行校準，涵蓋時間和頻譜領域。<lb/>這種聯合優化允許可靠的OOD拒絕和可信的偽標註。<lb/>在PTB-XL和PhysioNet/CinC挑戰基準上評估，SafeECGMatch實現了最先進的準確性和校準，推進了生理時間序列中的可靠知識發現。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/labhai/SafeECGMatch 獲得。
2606.08037.author: Hongkyu Koh et.al.
